songs.title: She's So Mean
feed: “She's So Mean” by Matchbox Twenty reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“She's So Mean” by Matchbox Twenty has now completed one year (52 weeks of charting) in Personal Hot 100.
“She's So Mean” by Matchbox Twenty reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 8 spots to #1.
“She's So Mean” by Matchbox Twenty climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 8 spots to #1.
“She's So Mean” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 16,765 sales units.
“She's So Mean” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 100,433,025 streams units.
“She's So Mean” by Matchbox Twenty is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 486,010 total units.
